---
name: Improve Existing Entry
about: Correct, clarify, or expand an existing vice entry
title: "[IMPROVE] VC/VT-xxx — What to improve"
labels: improvement, needs-review
assignees: ''
---

## Entry ID
<!-- e.g. VC-042 or VT-015 -->

## Preflight
- [ ] I checked the current catalog and existing wiki coverage
- [ ] I defined the intended scope of this change
- [ ] I listed likely impacts and any out-of-scope follow-ups
- [ ] I will move any post-execution ideas that expand scope into backlog first

## What's wrong or incomplete?
<!-- Be specific about what needs to change and why -->

## Proposed improvement
<!-- What should the entry say instead? -->

## Downstream Verification
<!-- If this edit changes the downstream expectation, choose it explicitly -->
- [ ] required
- [ ] none

## Is this a breaking change to the entry?
- [ ] Yes (changes meaning significantly)
- [ ] No (clarifies without changing meaning)
